title: Brathys gentianoides
taxonomy: Brathys gentianoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to certain regions and is classified within the family of gentian plants, which comprises around 80 genera. The Gentianaceae family is part of the order Gentianales and is further classified within the clade Asterids in the APG III system. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Brathys gentianoides and other related plants.
